controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
1 These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural
Banks - Asset Liability Management) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - asset liability management) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure become effective from the date of issue
controls.control_description: 2 These Directions shall become effective from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to become effective from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.control_description:
Applicability
3 These Directions shall be applicable to Regional Rural Banks (hereinafter
collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to regional rural banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as a 'bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance period' is the time taken to liquidate the investment in securities on the basis of liquidit
controls.control_description:
Definitions
4 In these Directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 'Defeasance Period' is the time taken to liquidate the investment in
securities on the basis of liquidity in the secondary market.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 'defeasance period' is the time taken to liquidate the investment in securities on the basis of liquidit

controls.control_objective: To ensure risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition
controls.control_description:
(2) 'Interest Rate Risk' means risk where changes in market interest rates
might adversely affect a bank's financial condition.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to risk where changes in market interest rates might adversely affect a bank's financial condition

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 20
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR)' shall have the same meaning as defined in
the Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio
and Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in the reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as defined in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Statutory Liquidity Ratio (SLR)' shall have the same meaning as defined
in Reserve Bank of India (Regional Rural Banks - Cash Reserve Ratio and
Statutory Liquidity Ratio) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as defined in reserve bank of india (regional rural banks - cash reserve ratio and statutory liquidity ratio) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the facility as mentioned in rbi press release dated september 30, 2025
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Marginal Standing Facility (MSF)' shall mean the facility as mentioned in
RBI press release dated September 30, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the facility as mentioned in rbi press release dated september 30, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification
controls.control_description:
<image>
5 All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the BR Act, the RBI Act, rules / regulations
made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re-enactment thereto or as
used in commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the br act, the rbi act, rules / regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy and procedures, set prudential limits, auditing, r
controls.control_description:
Responsibilities of the Board
6 The Board shall have the overall responsibility for management of risks and shall
decide the risk management policy and procedures, set prudential limits,
auditing, reporting and review mechanism in respect of liquidity, interest rate, and
forex risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have the overall responsibility for management of risks and shall decide the risk management policy and procedures, set prudential limits, auditing, r

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the alm policy, exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the alm system and review its functioning periodically
controls.control_description:
Approval of policies, limits, and reviews
7 The Board shall approve the ALM Policy, exercise the requisite oversight on the
implementation of the ALM system and review its functioning periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve the alm policy, exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the alm system and review its functioning periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets for structural liquidity statement
controls.control_description:
8 The Board shall approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches
(running total) across all time buckets for Structural Liquidity Statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the internal prudential limits for cumulative mismatches (running total) across all time buckets for structural liquidity statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve prudential limits on individual gaps of interest rate sensitivity statement for a bank
controls.control_description:
9 The Board shall approve prudential limits on individual Gaps of Interest Rate
Sensitivity Statement for a bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve prudential limits on individual gaps of interest rate sensitivity statement for a bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure serve as a benchmark for alm system for those banks that lack a formal alm system
controls.control_description:
Introduction
10 These Directions shall serve as a benchmark for ALM system for those banks
that lack a formal ALM system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to serve as a benchmark for alm system for those banks that lack a formal alm system

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with alm systems suggested in the directions
controls.control_description:
In case a bank has introduced more sophisticated
systems, it may continue with it, but shall ensure compliance with ALM systems
suggested in the directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with alm systems suggested in the directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide a dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate and foreign exchange (forex) risks, involving assessment o
controls.control_description:
ALM, among other functions, shall provide a dynamic
framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate and
foreign exchange (forex) risks, involving assessment of various types of risks and
altering balance sheet (assets and liabilities) items in a dynamic manner to
manage risks.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to provide a dynamic framework for measuring, monitoring and managing liquidity, interest rate and foreign exchange (forex) risks, involving assessment o

controls.control_objective: To ensure rest on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems comprising of:
controls.control_description:
11 The ALM system shall rest on the following three pillars:
(1) ALM Information Systems comprising of:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to rest on the following three pillars: (1) alm information systems comprising of:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be supported by specific risk policies and procedures and prudential limits
controls.control_description:
ALM Information Systems
12 ALM shall be supported by specific risk policies and procedures and prudential
limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be supported by specific risk policies and procedures and prudential limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be built on sound methodology, with the availability of timely, adequate and accurate information being central to the alm exercise
controls.control_description:
The framework shall be built on sound methodology, with the availability
of timely, adequate and accurate information being central to the ALM exercise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be built on sound methodology, with the availability of timely, adequate and accurate information being central to the alm exercise

controls.control_objective: To ensure constitute an asset-liability management committee (alco), headed by the ceo or the secretary, which shall be responsible for ensuring <image> adheren
controls.control_description:
ALM Organisation
13 A bank shall constitute an Asset-Liability Management Committee (ALCO),
headed by the CEO or the Secretary, which shall be responsible for ensuring
<image>
adherence to the policies and limits set by the Board as well as for deciding the
business strategy (on both assets and liabilities) in line with the bank's business
and risk management objectives.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to constitute an asset-liability management committee (alco), headed by the ceo or the secretary, which shall be responsible for ensuring <image> adheren

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the alm policy, exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the alm system, and review its functioning periodically
controls.control_description:
The Board shall approve the ALM Policy,
exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the ALM system, and
review its functioning periodically.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to approve the alm policy, exercise the requisite oversight on the implementation of the alm system, and review its functioning periodically

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of liquidity, intere
controls.control_description:
14 The ALCO shall be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet
planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of
liquidity, interest rate, and forex risks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a decision-making unit responsible for balance sheet planning from risk-return perspective, including the strategic management of liquidity, intere

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on a bank's views on current interest rates
controls.control_description:
The ALCO's future business strategy
decisions shall be based on a bank's views on current interest rates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on a bank's views on current interest rates

controls.control_objective: To ensure develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes between fixed and floating rate funds, wholesale and retail
controls.control_description:
The ALCO shall develop a view on future
direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes between fixed
and floating rate funds, wholesale and retail deposits, short term and long-term
deposits, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to develop a view on future direction of interest rate movements and decide on funding mixes between fixed and floating rate funds, wholesale and retail

controls.control_objective: To ensure depend on the size of the bank, level of business and organisational structure
controls.control_description:
15 The size (number of members) of ALCO shall depend on the size of the bank,
level of business and organisational structure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depend on the size of the bank, level of business and organisational structure

controls.control_objective: To ensure be an invitee
controls.control_description:
The Head of the
Information Technology Division responsible for building up of MIS, shall be an
invitee.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be an invitee

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, have sub-committees and support groups
controls.control_description:
An RRB shall, at its discretion, have Sub-committees and Support
Groups.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, have sub-committees and support groups

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the alco
controls.control_description:
16 The ALM Support Groups, consisting of operating staff, shall be responsible for
analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for analysing, monitoring and reporting the risk profiles to the alco

controls.control_objective: To ensure also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t
controls.control_description:
The staff shall
also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible
changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend the
action needed to adhere to bank's internal limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also prepare forecasts (simulations) showing the effects of various possible changes in market conditions related to the balance sheet and recommend t

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the board
controls.control_description:
17 The business and risk management strategy of the Top Management shall
ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that it operates within the limits / parameters set by the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter alia consider pricing of both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities, etc
controls.control_description:
The ALCO
shall inter alia consider pricing of both deposits and advances, desired maturity
profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter alia consider pricing of both deposits and advances, desired maturity profile and mix of the incremental assets and liabilities, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure also review the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings
controls.control_description:
In addition to
monitoring the risk levels of a bank, the ALCO shall also review the results of and
progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also review the results of and progress in implementation of the decisions made in the previous meetings

controls.control_objective: To ensure be decided by the bank
controls.control_description:
<image>
18 The frequency for holding ALCO meetings shall be decided by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be decided by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure periodically review and keep the board informed of the status of implementation of alm, including alm system, functioning of alco, status of computeri
controls.control_description:
19 A bank shall periodically review and keep the Board informed of the status of
implementation of ALM, including ALM system, functioning of ALCO, status of
computerization, training requirements of officers / staff.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to periodically review and keep the board informed of the status of implementation of alm, including alm system, functioning of alco, status of computeri

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as follows, with focus on liquidity and interest rate risk: (1) liquidity risk management
controls.control_description:
ALM Process
20 The scope of ALM function shall be as follows, with focus on Liquidity and Interest
rate risk:
(1) Liquidity risk management;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as follows, with focus on liquidity and interest rate risk: (1) liquidity risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions / scenari
controls.control_description:
22 A bank shall measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis and also examine
how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions /
scenarios.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measure liquidity positions on an ongoing basis and also examine how liquidity requirements are likely to evolve under different assumptions / scenari

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used as a standard tool for measuring the liquidity profile under the flow approach, at selected maturity buckets
controls.control_description:
Maturity Ladder-based monitoring
23 The maturity ladder shall be used as a standard tool for measuring the liquidity
profile under the flow approach, at selected maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used as a standard tool for measuring the liquidity profile under the flow approach, at selected maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure , accordingly, utilise the format of the structural liquidity statement (sls) under static scenario without reckoning future business growth as given
controls.control_description:
A bank shall,
accordingly, utilise the format of the Structural Liquidity Statement (SLS) under
static scenario without reckoning future business growth as given in Annex-I.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , accordingly, utilise the format of the structural liquidity statement (sls) under static scenario without reckoning future business growth as given

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for assessing the future cash flows of a bank in different time buckets
controls.control_description:
24 The Maturity Profile as given in Annex-IV shall be used for assessing the future
cash flows of a bank in different time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for assessing the future cash flows of a bank in different time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed as under: (1) 1 to 14 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed according to the expected timing of cash flows
controls.control_description:
25 All cash inflows and outflows in the maturity ladder shall be placed according to
the expected timing of cash flows.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed according to the expected timing of cash flows

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow
controls.control_description:
A maturing liability shall be a cash outflow
while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cash outflow while a maturing asset shall be a cash inflow

controls.control_objective: To ensure make appropriate assumptions according to its asset - liability profile
controls.control_description:
While determining the probable
cash inflows / outflows, a bank shall make appropriate assumptions according to
its asset - liability profile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make appropriate assumptions according to its asset - liability profile

controls.control_objective: To ensure take into account all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, nature of business, future strategy, etc
controls.control_description:
While determining the tolerance levels, a bank shall take
into account all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, nature of
business, future strategy, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to take into account all relevant factors, based on its asset-liability base, nature of business, future strategy, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix tolerance levels for various maturities in the sls, depending on its asset-liability profile, extent of stable deposit base, the nature of cash fl
controls.control_description:
26 Top Management of a bank shall fix tolerance levels for various maturities in the
SLS, depending on its asset-liability profile, extent of stable deposit base, the
nature of cash flows, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix tolerance levels for various maturities in the sls, depending on its asset-liability profile, extent of stable deposit base, the nature of cash fl

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on the short-term mismatches, viz
controls.control_description:
While mismatches upto one year would be relevant since
these provide early warning signals of impending liquidity problems, the main
focus should be on the short-term mismatches, viz., 1-14 days and 15-28 days
time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on the short-term mismatches, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in each time bucket
controls.control_description:
The mismatches (negative gap between cash inflows and outflows)
during the 1-14 days, and 15-28 days time buckets in normal course should not
exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in each time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 20 per cent of the cash outflows in each time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective residual maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity
controls.control_description:
28 The investment in SLR securities and other investment shall be shown under
respective residual maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective residual maturity buckets, corresponding to the residual maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure show the trading securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days' time buckets, on the basis of the defeasance periods
controls.control_description:
29 A bank which maintains trading book and complies with the following
requirements shall show the trading securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and
29-90 days' time buckets, on the basis of the defeasance periods.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show the trading securities under 1-14 days, 15-28 days, and 29-90 days' time buckets, on the basis of the defeasance periods

controls.control_objective: To ensure approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc
controls.control_description:
30 The ALCO of the bank shall approve the volume, composition, holding /
defeasance period, cut loss, etc., of the trading book.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approve the volume, composition, holding / defeasance period, cut loss, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify them in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
Behavioural Patterns
31 Notwithstanding guidance provided in Annex-IV, a bank which is better equipped
to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern of various components of assets
and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies shall classify them in
the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify them in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes as per format provided in a
controls.control_description:
Statement of Dynamic Liquidity
32 A bank shall estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business
projections and other commitments for planning purposes as per format provided
in Annex-II for estimating Short-term Dynamic Liquidity over a time horizon
spanning from 1-90 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to estimate its short-term liquidity profile on the basis of business projections and other commitments for planning purposes as per format provided in a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to access the liquidity adjustment facility (laf) and the marginal standing facility (msf) subject to compliance with the following condit
controls.control_description:
Liquidity Adjustment Facility (LAF) and Marginal Standing Facility (MSF)
33 A Scheduled RRB shall be eligible to access the Liquidity Adjustment Facility
(LAF) and the Marginal Standing Facility (MSF) subject to compliance with the
following conditions:
(1) Implemented Core Banking Solution (CBS);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to access the liquidity adjustment facility (laf) and the marginal standing facility (msf) subject to compliance with the following condit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reviewed on an ongoing basis
controls.control_description:
The eligibility
status of each bank shall be reviewed on an ongoing basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reviewed on an ongoing basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure set gap limits and also adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forex exposures
controls.control_description:
36 A bank with AD authorisation shall set gap limits and also adopt Value at Risk
(VaR) approach to measure the risk associated with forex exposures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set gap limits and also adopt value at risk (var) approach to measure the risk associated with forex exposures

controls.control_objective: To ensure form part of the risk management approach to forex operations
controls.control_description:
The open
position limits together with the gap limits shall form part of the risk management
approach to forex operations.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to form part of the risk management approach to forex operations

controls.control_objective: To ensure initially use the traditional gap analysis (tga) for measuring the interest rate risk
controls.control_description:
38 An RRB shall initially use the Traditional Gap Analysis (TGA) for measuring the
Interest Rate Risk.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to initially use the traditional gap analysis (tga) for measuring the interest rate risk

controls.control_objective: To ensure measurement of "gap", i
controls.control_description:
Traditional Gap Analysis
39 Gap analysis means measurement of "Gap", i.e., mismatches between rate
sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets (including off-balance sheet
positions) through a Gap Report generated by grouping rate sensitive liabilities,
assets and off-balance sheet positions into time bands according to residual
maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to measurement of "gap", i

controls.control_objective: To ensure ascertain gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i
controls.control_description:
40 Under TGA, a bank shall ascertain Gap or Mismatch risk by calculating Gaps,
i.e., mismatches between rate sensitive liabilities and rate sensitive assets, over
different time intervals as at a given date, by preparing Interest Rate Sensitivity
Statement provided in Annex - III.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ascertain gap or mismatch risk by calculating gaps, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare to switch over to more sophisticated techniques like duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk for interest rate risk management
controls.control_description:
42 After stabilisation of ALM System and as a bank gains experience, it should
prepare to switch over to more sophisticated techniques like Duration Gap
Analysis, Simulation, and Value at Risk for interest rate risk management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare to switch over to more sophisticated techniques like duration gap analysis, simulation, and value at risk for interest rate risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure report assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the interest rate sensitivity statement
controls.control_description:
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement
43 A bank shall report assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the
Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report assets, liabilities, and off-balance sheet positions in the interest rate sensitivity statement

controls.control_objective: To ensure be grouped into time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier
controls.control_description:
44 The rate sensitive liabilities, assets, and off-balance sheet positions shall be
grouped into time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing period,
whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be grouped into time buckets according to residual maturity or next repricing period, whichever is earlier

controls.control_objective: To ensure be identified in the following time buckets: (1) up to 3 months
controls.control_description:
The Gaps shall be identified in the following time buckets:
(1) Up to 3 months;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be identified in the following time buckets: (1) up to 3 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified as explained in annex-v
controls.control_description:
45 The various items of rate sensitive assets, liabilities and off-balance sheet items
shall be classified as explained in Annex-V.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified as explained in annex-v

controls.control_objective: To ensure set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board
controls.control_description:
47 A bank shall set prudential limits on individual Gaps with the approval of the
Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to set prudential limits on individual gaps with the approval of the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity
controls.control_description:
The prudential limits shall be based on the Total Assets, Earning Assets,
or Equity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be based on the total assets, earning assets, or equity

controls.control_objective: To ensure also work out earnings at risk (ear) in terms of last year's nil or net interest margin (nim) aligned with its views on interest rate movements
controls.control_description:
A bank shall also work out Earnings at Risk (EaR) in terms of last
year's NIl or Net Interest Margin (NIM) aligned with its views on interest rate
movements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also work out earnings at risk (ear) in terms of last year's nil or net interest margin (nim) aligned with its views on interest rate movements

controls.control_objective: To ensure classify them in the appropriate time buckets
controls.control_description:
Behavioural Patterns
48 Notwithstanding guidance provided in Annex-V, a bank which is better equipped
to reasonably estimate the behavioural pattern of various components of assets
and liabilities on the basis of past data / empirical studies shall classify them in
the appropriate time buckets, subject to approval from the ALCO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to classify them in the appropriate time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare the sls for capturing the maturity structure of the cash flows, as on the last reporting friday of march / june / september / december and put
controls.control_description:
Preparation and Review of Statements 49 A bank shall prepare the SLS for capturing the maturity structure of the cash
flows, as on the last reporting Friday of March / June / September / December
and put up to ALCO / Top Management within a month from the close of the last
reporting Friday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prepare the sls for capturing the maturity structure of the cash flows, as on the last reporting friday of march / june / september / december and put

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prepared and put up to the alco / top management within 2 / 3 days from the close of the reporting friday
controls.control_description:
50 The statement of Short-term Dynamic Liquidity as on each reporting Friday shall
be prepared and put up to the ALCO / Top Management within 2 / 3 days from
the close of the reporting Friday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prepared and put up to the alco / top management within 2 / 3 days from the close of the reporting friday

controls.control_objective: To ensure prepare interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement as on the last reporting friday of march / june / september / december and submit to the alco / top
controls.control_description:
51 For reporting interest rate sensitive assets and liabilities, a bank shall prepare
Interest Rate Sensitivity (IRS) Statement as on the last reporting Friday of March
/ June / September / December and submit to the ALCO / Top Management within
a month from the last reporting Friday.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to prepare interest rate sensitivity (irs) statement as on the last reporting friday of march / june / september / december and submit to the alco / top

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the sls and irs to nabard as per following schedule: sr no returns for the quarter ending due date for submission 1 march may 31 2 june august
controls.control_description:
52 Bank shall submit the SLS and IRS to NABARD as per following schedule:
Sr No Returns for the quarter ending Due date for submission
1 March May 31
2 June August 15
3 September November 15
4 December February 15
<image>
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the sls and irs to nabard as per following schedule: sr no returns for the quarter ending due date for submission 1 march may 31 2 june august

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions and
guidelines already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
54 Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may
be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
Application of other laws not barred
55 The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
Interpretations
56 For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any
provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified into volatile and core portions
controls.control_description:
Outflows Capital, Reserves and Surplus Over 5 years bucket Demand Deposits (Current and Savings Bank Deposits)
Savings Bank and Current Deposits may be classified into volatile and core portions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified into volatile and core portions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as volatile
controls.control_description: This portion may be treated as volatile.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as volatile

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 1- 3 years time buckets
controls.control_description: While volatile portion can be placed in the first time buckets, i.e., 1-14 days, the core portion may be placed in over 1- 3 years time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 1- 3 years time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective residual time buckets
controls.control_description: However, the bulk deposits and inter-bank deposits shall be shown under respective residual time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective residual time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description: Branch Adjustments The net credit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 5 years' time bucket
controls.control_description: Items not representing cash payables (i.e., guarantee fee received in advance, etc.) may be placed in over 5 years' time bucket .
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 5 years' time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time bands corresponding to the maturity profile of d
controls.control_description:
Inflows
<image>
Cash 1-14 days time buckets Balances with | RBI / Public Sector Banks for CRR / SLR purpose
While the excess balance over the required CRR / SLR may be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the Statutory Balances may be distributed amongst various time bands corresponding to the maturity profile of DTL with a time-lag of 28 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under 1-14 days time buckets, the statutory balances may be distributed amongst various time bands corresponding to the maturity profile of d

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description:
Current Account
Non-withdrawable portion on account of stipulations of minimum balances may be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 1-3 years time bucket and the remaining balances may be shown under 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time buckets (doubtful)
controls.control_description: Investments classified as NPAs should be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time buckets (doubtful).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 3-5 years time buckets (sub-standard) or over 5 years time buckets (doubtful)

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified
controls.control_description: An RRB should undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake a study of behavioural and seasonal pattern of availments based on outstandings and the core and volatile portion should be identified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket
controls.control_description: While the volatile portion could be shown in the near-term maturity time buckets, the core portion may be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 1-3 year time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity time buckets
controls.control_description: Term Loans Interim cash flows (instalments) should be shown under respective maturity time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description:
Other Assets Branch Adjustments
The net debit balance may be shown in 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 5 years time bucket
controls.control_description: Intangible assets and assets not representing cash receivables may be shown in over 5 years time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 5 years time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months
controls.control_description: Bank should undertake a study of the behavioural and seasonal pattern of potential availments in the accounts and the amounts so arrived at may be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under relevant residual maturity time buckets within 12 months

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed across time buckets
controls.control_description:
1-14 days time bucket Letters of Credit / Guarantees devolvement (outflow)
Based on past history, these should be distributed across time buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed across time buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: which are known to an RRB and any other contingency may be shown under respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket
controls.control_description: All overdue liabilities should be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the 1-14 days time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 3-6 months, time bucket
controls.control_description:
Interest and instalments from advances and investments, which are overdue for less than one month may be placed in over 3-6
months, time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 3-6 months, time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in over 6-12 months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected
controls.control_description:
Further, interest and instalments due (before classification as NPAs) may be placed in over 6-12 months
time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in over 6-12 months time bucket if the earlier receivables remain uncollected

controls.control_objective: To ensure show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits
controls.control_description:
Financing of Gap
In case the negative gap exceeds the prudential limit of 20 per cent of outflows, (1-14 and 15-28 days time buckets) an RRB may show
by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to show by way of a foot note as to how it proposes to finance the gap to bring the mismatch within the prescribed limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure be included in over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: This should be included in over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be included in over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in non- sensitive bucket
controls.control_description: The non-interest-paying portion may be shown in non- sensitive bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in non- sensitive bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining term to maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to different time buckets on the basis of remaining maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the appropriate time bucket that refers to the resetting date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: Repos / Bills Re-discounted (DUPN), Sensitive reprices only on maturity and should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: Balances with RBI Interest earning portion may be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown in over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be distributed to the respective maturity buckets
controls.control_description: The amounts should be distributed to the respective maturity buckets.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be distributed to the respective maturity buckets

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket
controls.control_description: may be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown under over 3-6 months time bucket

controls.control_objective: To ensure be suitably classified as and when introduced
controls.control_description: Other products (Interest Rate) (i) Other (i) Should be suitably classified as and when introduced.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be suitably classified as and when introduced
